pr.title: #1 on leaderboard: val_bpb=1.1574 — Int6 + MLP 3x + selective precision + optimized long-context training

output.summary: Int6 post-training quantization with fp16 passthrough lets a 3× wider MLP train at 2048 tokens while stride-256 sliding-window eval captures long context.
techniques: Int6 PTQ with fp16 passthrough for tied embeddings and late-key layers
2048-token training, 786K-token batches, and tight 0.3 gradient clipping
Sliding-window evaluation with stride 256 to expose long context
